title: India Research Trip
description: Wrote a Medium article about a recent research trip to India, giving a series of talks on our Programming in Plain Language work across several universities.

title: Engineering Education Affiliate Faculty
description: David has been appointed as an affiliate faculty member of the Department of Engineering Education at Virginia Tech.

title: CHCI Affiliate Faculty
description: David has been appointed as an affiliate faculty member of the Center for Human-Computer Interaction (CHCI) at Virginia Tech.

title: Officially at Virginia Tech
description: David has officially started his position as Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science at Virginia Tech.

title: Two Papers at ITiCSE 2025
description: Presented two papers at ITiCSE 2025 in the Netherlands. One was nominated for the conference's Best Paper Award.

links.text: Counting the Trees in the Forest

title: Llama Impact Grant Awarded
description: David and collaborator Paul Denny have been awarded a Llama Impact Grant to pursue work on EiPL questions and Prompt problems.

title: ACM TOCE Associate Editor
description: David has joined ACM Transactions on Computing Education as an Associate Editor.

title: Dissertation Defended
description: David successfully defended his dissertation "Discovering, Auto-generating, and Evaluating Distractors in Parsons Problems in CS1".

title: Virginia Tech Position Accepted
description: David has accepted a tenure-track Assistant Professor position at Virginia Tech in the Department of Computer Science starting Fall 2025.

title: Two Papers Accepted to ITiCSE 2025
description: Two papers on EiPL questions accepted to ITiCSE 2025: "ReDefining Code Comprehension" and "Counting the Trees in the Forest". Pre-prints available on arXiv.

links.text: Counting the Trees in the Forest

title: Paper Accepted to SIGCSE 2025
description: Our paper "Exploring Student Reactions to LLM-Generated Feedback on Explain in Plain English Problems" was accepted to ACM SIGCSE 2025.

title: University of Toronto Talks
description: Visited University of Toronto St. George and Mississauga to give a talk on "Explain in Plain Language Questions".

title: Paper Accepted to COMPUTE 2025
description: Our paper "Explain in Plain Language Question with Indic Languages" was accepted to COMPUTE 2025 and is available on arXiv.

title: Dagstuhl Seminar Invitation
description: Invited to Dagstuhl Seminar 25311 on "Generative AI is Programming Education".
